subject: WS1.4 product/tests ready for read-only support check
body: Fiery WS1.4 is product/tests ready under claim cdeae6ac. Files: packages/core/graph-core/package.json, src/index.ts, src/jsonld/index.ts, src/jsonld/processor.ts, src/jsonld/processor.unit.test.ts, pnpm-lock.yaml. Current verification green: pnpm --filter @oaknational/graph-core test (4 files, 39 tests), type-check, lint, build. Key acceptance: deterministic SKOS expand/compact; Oak Threads frame converted to DatasetCore equivalence; repo-owned public JSON-LD types with jsonld.js hidden behind the driver boundary. Please keep read-only and report clear correctness issues to Luminous/Fiery.
